use_cases: Triggering form submissions in web applications
Providing clickable actions with visual state feedback
Enabling composition patterns with asChild prop
Supporting multiple button variants for UI consistency
Creating accessible button interfaces with focus states
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based button component with CVA-powered variant system supporting multiple styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Uses Slot for composition, includes proper accessibility features with focus-visible states, and applies subtle shadow effects. Designed as a foundational UI element for form actions and interface controls across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev tools applications.
